channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Business shifts focus from tech bros to real people and places
item.description: Plus: Fortune's latest news and watercooler discussions.

item.title: Nasdaq CFO Sarah Youngwood's AI strategy revealed
item.description: Youngwood integrates AI across finance and ranks her team like martial artists.

item.title: Pimco dismisses Trump's NATO threats as a 'paper tiger'
item.description: Morning briefing: Key insights before you start your workday.

item.title: Mega-funds capture 72% of all capital raised, widening the gap in VC's haves and have-nots
item.description: PitchBook's midyear data reveals an increasingly uneven venture capital landscape.
